prompt_used: Story: The Harvest Men (the-harvest-men) | Hook: A ritual mask selects a new wearer every dusk, and refusals vanish overnight. | Subgenre: folk horror | Tone: SLOW_BURN | Location: Isolated valley communes and threshing grounds | Villain: The Reaper Steward | Villain worldview: Communities survive only through chosen sacrifice. | Motifs: corn husk knots, lantern smoke, harvest blades. Compose ending score cue for "Compromised Truth" that supports summary "You halt tonight's rite but trigger retaliatory disappearances." and epilogue "The culprit is exposed, but allies and witnesses are fractured.".
